description_long: This jewelry store is a compact, rectangular commercial building with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist facade. The front features a large, dark glass entrance door, flanked by a prominent display window with a gold fleur-de-lis logo, suggesting a high-end brand identity. There are small planters with greenery on either side of the entrance, adding a touch of elegance and inviting atmosphere. The side walls are plain and white, punctuated by two small, square windows, while the rear is completely unadorned. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with glass and metal elements for the storefront. The overall design is clean and functional, with subtle decorative touches that emphasize security and exclusivity.
description: A modern, rectangular jewelry store with a flat roof, dark glass entrance, gold logo display, and minimalistic white side walls.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, large display window with gold logo, and planters flanking the doorway.
description_view_1: Side view reveals two small, square windows on a plain white wall, with the entrance and display window partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view is completely plain and unadorned, showing only the flat white wall and roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, with no windows or features except the building's clean lines.
attribute_storefront_signage: A gold fleur-de-lis logo is prominently displayed on the right side of the storefront window, set against a dark background. No text is visible. The signage appears to be made of metallic or gold-colored material.
